documentation.description:
This package provides "enumerable" types for different sizes. Each type
has a finite set of integer values, thus can be used as an index for
arrays and case statements. However, these types does not have any
arithmetic and bitwise logical operations defined, so they cannot be used
for calculations.

simple_types.name: Enumerable_2
simple_types.code: type Enumerable_2 is mod 2 ** 2 with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: Enumerable_3
simple_types.code: type Enumerable_3 is mod 2 ** 3 with Size => 3;

simple_types.name: Enumerable_4
simple_types.code: type Enumerable_4 is mod 2 ** 4 with Size => 4;

simple_types.name: Enumerable_5
simple_types.code: type Enumerable_5 is mod 2 ** 5 with Size => 5;

simple_types.name: Enumerable_6
simple_types.code: type Enumerable_6 is mod 2 ** 6 with Size => 6;

simple_types.name: Enumerable_7
simple_types.code: type Enumerable_7 is mod 2 ** 7 with Size => 7;

simple_types.name: Enumerable_8
simple_types.code: type Enumerable_8 is mod 2 ** 8 with Size => 8;
